author: acidghost
description: Automatically fill progress (as fraction or percentage) of check-lists.

manifest.author: acidghost
manifest.description: Automatically fill progress (as fraction or percentage) of check-lists.
manifest.name: Checklist Progress

name: Checklist Progress

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fixed compatibility issue with Obsidian Tasks plugin (#4).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Auto-update on every change is not possible anymore with modern versions of Obsidian; the plugin now efficiently auto-updates when a checkbox is toggled in a Live Preview editor.
- Added ability to track unchecked checkboxes instead of checked ones; just add a minus before the number or fraction or percent sign: `(-/)`, `(-%)`.
- Now recognizes checkboxes with a `-` as mark and counts it as checked.
